svg.title: Smart Canteen App — Project Workflow
svg.desc: Concise single-diagram flowchart of the full request lifecycle: user interaction, validation, auth, controller processing, database, notification, and response.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What triggers an API call in the Smart Canteen App?')
sendPrompt('How does Zod validation work in the Express API?')
sendPrompt('How does JWT middleware authenticate requests?')
sendPrompt('How does the router check if a route requires admin access?')
sendPrompt('What does the isAdmin middleware check?')
sendPrompt('Which operations trigger Firebase vs Mongoose?')
sendPrompt('What does Firebase Admin SDK sync during registration?')
sendPrompt('What CRUD operations does Mongoose perform?')
sendPrompt('How is data persisted in MongoDB Atlas?')
sendPrompt('What gets saved to the notifications collection?')
sendPrompt('What does a successful JSON response contain?')
sendPrompt('How does React Native update UI after an API response?')
